en.role: Regional Change Management, Implementation and Training Specialist

en.mainResponsibility: Led the implementation of global technological tools in the Latin America and Caribbean (LAC) region, coordinating with multiple stakeholders to ensure adoption and strategic alignment.

highlights: Successful implementation of an insurance project in Suriname

en.mainResponsibility: Led strategic projects for the bank, including a 3-year institutional strategy, credit portfolio evaluation for potential acquisition, and implementation of changes to core banking systems.
highlights: Developed the bank's 3-year institutional strategy
